name: Oriental Spice for Stir-Fry
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients.
2. Refrigerate in a covered container.
3. To use, sprinkle as desired over poultry or meat stir-fry dishes.
4. Makes about 2 teaspoons.
5. NOTE: Contains about 1 mg sodium per 1/2 teaspoon and approximately 2 calories per 1/2 teaspoon.
